steps.title: Collect the x-terms
steps.content:
Start with
$$
x(r-8)+5=20x+29
$$
Subtract $20x$ and $5$ from both sides:
$$
x(r-8)-20x=24
$$
$$
x(r-28)=24
$$

steps.title: Find the impossible value
steps.content: There is exactly one solution only if the coefficient of $x$ is not $0$: $$ r-28\ne 0 $$ So the value that cannot work is $28$. The answer is D.
